name: Trifle
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Jello according to package instructions.
2. Cut the ladyfingers in half and arrange them at the bottom of a serving glass or bowl.
3. Pour the Marsala wine over the ladyfingers, ensuring they are fully submerged.
4. Let the mixture sit for a few minutes to allow the ladyfingers to absorb the liquid.
5. Layer the prepared Jello evenly over the soaked ladyfingers.
6. Arrange the fruit on top of the Jello layer.
7. Add the instant custard layers on top of the fruit, spreading them out evenly.
8. Finish with a generous dollop of whipped cream on top.
